code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Education_ContentCDN] --> PENDING: Order Placed

    PENDING --> PAID: Payment Authorized & Escrowed
    PENDING --> CANCELLED: Payment Failed

    PAID --> SHIPPED: Seller Ships Order
    PAID --> CANCELLED: Seller Cancels

    SHIPPED --> DELIVERED: Carrier Reports Delivery
    SHIPPED --> CANCELLED: Delivery Failed

    DELIVERED --> COMPLETED: Delivery Confirmed (Education_StudentDB)
    DELIVERED --> DISPUTED: Customer Raises Dispute

    DISPUTED --> COMPLETED: Dispute Resolved - Favor Seller
    DISPUTED --> CANCELLED: Dispute Resolved - Favor Customer (Education_GradeSync)

    COMPLETED --> [Education_ClassroomService]: Funds Released to Seller
    CANCELLED --> [Education_LMS_Portal]: Funds Refunded to Customer

    note right of PENDING
        Data: order_id, total_amount
        Escrow: Not yet created
    end note

    note right of PAID
        Data: payment_id, escrow_id
        Escrow: Funds held
        Trigger: Seller notification sent
    end note

    note right of SHIPPED
        Data: tracking_number, carrier
        Escrow: Still held
        Trigger: Customer notification sent
    end note

    note right of DELIVERED
        Data: delivered_at timestamp
        Escrow: Still held
        Auto-confirm: Timer starts
    end note

    note right of COMPLETED
        Data: confirmed_at timestamp
        Escrow: Released to seller
        Final state
    end note

    note right of DISPUTED
        Data: dispute_reason, dispute_date
        Escrow: Frozen until resolution
        Manual: Admin intervention
    end note

    note right of CANCELLED
        Data: cancelled_at, cancel_reason
        Escrow: Refunded to customer
        Final state
    end note
repo_description: System design skill for Claude Code using EventStorming and Mermaid diagrams

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育内容交易平台设计一个订单状态流转图。核心是从ContentCDN的内容交付开始，经过支付托管、物流配送到最终完成或取消。关键是资金 escrow 机制要和Education_StudentDB、Education_GradeSync这些教育子系统联动。
明白，我先梳理主干流程。起点是Education_ContentCDN，然后进入PENDING状态。支付成功后到PAID，这里要创建escrow托管资金对吗？如果支付失败直接走到CANCELLED？
对的，PENDING到PAID是"Payment Authorized & Escrowed"，资金进入托管状态。另外PAID之后卖家可以发货到SHIPPED，也可能主动取消。SHIPPED之后由carrier报告送达进入DELIVERED。
好的，我先把这几个核心状态和流转画出来。DELIVERED之后需要客户确认吗？还是自动完成？
DELIVERED这里有个分支：正常情况是客户确认后进入COMPLETED，资金释放给卖家；但如果客户发起争议，就进入DISPUTED状态。争议解决有两种结果——支持卖家则回到COMPLETED，支持客户则取消订单，这时候要联动Education_GradeSync做成绩相关的退款处理。
清楚了，DISPUTED是人工介入的状态，escrow资金冻结。那最终完成和取消的资金去向呢？COMPLETED和CANCELLED都是终态吗？
是的，两个都是终态。COMPLETED完成后资金释放到Education_ClassroomService给卖家；CANCELLED则退款到Education_LMS_Portal给客户。另外DELIVERED状态要加一个自动确认计时器，防止客户一直不操作。
我来补充各状态的详细注释，包括每个阶段的数据字段、escrow状态和触发动作。PENDING时escrow还未创建，PAID到SHIPPED期间资金持续托管，DELIVERED启动自动确认倒计时，DISPUTED需要管理员手动处理。
检查一遍，流程完整了。从ContentCDN下单，经过支付托管、物流配送到交付确认，争议处理联动GradeSync，最终资金要么到ClassroomService要么退回LMS Portal。各状态的注释也很清晰，可以定稿了。
